name: Noodle Pudding (Kugel)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together the eggs, sugar, lemon juice, salt, vanilla, and melted butter until well combined.
2. In another bowl, cream together the cottage cheese and cream cheese until smooth.
3. Divide the egg mixture evenly between two bowls. Mix one portion with the cooked noodles and the other with the cottage cheese and cream cheese.
4. Grease a baking dish and layer half of the noodle and egg mixture alternately with pineapple chunks.
5. Dot the layers with butter, then repeat the layering process until all ingredients are used.
6. Sprinkle the final layer with cinnamon and brown sugar.
7. Cover the pan with foil and bake at 400°F for 40 minutes.
8. Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes to lightly brown the top.
